topic: The reality of remote work after 3 years.
post: Remote work isn't about working from a beach. It’s about reclaiming the 2 hours you used to spend in traffic. It’s about designing a schedule that fits your energy, not a clock.The greatest luxury in 2026 isn't a high salary—it’s full control over your physical location.

topic: How to stay relevant in the age of AI.
post: The most important skill today isn't knowing the right answers. It’s knowing how to ask the right questions. AI won't replace the expert, but it will replace the person who refuses to adapt. Stay curious. Experiment daily. Your ability to learn is your only true moat.
